content.text:
[Workflow Task from Orchestrator]
Workflow ID: 1780a5e2-28d
Subtask ID: e76ee3f0
Priority: 1

Task: TASK: Scalability & Performance Benchmarks. DELIVERABLE: Scalability testing plan + performance targets. SPECIFICATIONS: Define: 1) Load testing methodology, 2) Performance benchmarks (p50/p95/p99 response times), 3) Scalability thresholds per service, 4) Database scaling strategy (read replicas, sharding), 5) CDN and caching strategy. Target: < 3 second contract analysis at 99th percentile. METRIC: Complete scalability plan with measurable targets.

2. Potentially delegate to my workers for parallel research

Let me start by searching my memory and then orchestrating my workers

content.text: I'll orchestrate my workers to research and compile this scalability testing plan. Let me start by checking for any existing research, then dispatch parallel tasks to my team

arguments.query: scalability performance testing load benchmarks p99 response times database scaling CDN caching strategy

arguments.message: Research task for workflow 1780a5e2: Find current industry best practices for load testing methodology in distributed systems. Focus on: 1) Load testing frameworks (k6, JMeter, Locust, gatling), 2) Test scenarios and traffic patterns, 3) How to simulate realistic load. Return concise findings with tool recommendations.

Research task for workflow 1780a5e2: Research performance benchmark targets for modern SaaS APIs. Find industry-standard p50/p95/p99 latency targets. Focus on: 1) What's considered "good" for API response times, 2) SLA targets from major cloud providers, 3) Specific benchmarks for AI/LLM-powered services. Return with concrete numbers.

Research task for workflow 1780a5e2: Research database scaling strategies for high-throughput applications. Focus on: 1) Read replica architectures (when to use, how many), 2) Sharding strategies and partitioning schemes, 3) Connection pooling best practices, 4) Database-specific scaling (PostgreSQL, Redis). Return actionable strategies.

Research task for workflow 1780a5e2: Research CDN and caching strategies for API-heavy applications. Focus on: 1) CDN providers and features (Cloudflare, AWS CloudFront, Fastly), 2) Cache invalidation strategies, 3) Edge caching vs origin caching, 4) Cache hit ratio targets. Return with implementation guidance.
